recommendations.title: Lawrence of Arabia
recommendations.overview: During World War I, English officer Thomas Edward 'T.E.' Lawrence sets out to unite and lead the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes to fight the Turks.

recommendations.title: Doctor Zhivago
recommendations.overview: The life of a Russian physician and poet who, although married to another, falls in love with a political activist's wife and experiences hardship during World War I and then the October Revolution.

recommendations.title: Hobson's Choice
recommendations.overview: A widower refuses to let his three daughters marry in order to avoid paying settlements, so they'll just have to outsmart him.

recommendations.title: A Passage to India
recommendations.overview: Cultural mistrust and false accusations doom a friendship in British colonial India between an Indian doctor, an Englishwoman engaged to marry a city magistrate, and an English educator.

recommendations.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
recommendations.overview: The classic story of English POWs in Burma forced to build a bridge to aid the war effort of their Japanese captors. British and American intelligence officers conspire to blow up the structure, but Col. Nicholson, the commander who supervised the br

recommendations.title: Blithe Spirit
recommendations.overview: A harmless séance at a novelist's home summons the ghost of his glamorous first wife.

recommendations.title: Brief Encounter
recommendations.overview: Returning home from a shopping trip to a nearby town, bored suburban housewife Laura Jesson is thrown by happenstance into an acquaintance with virtuous doctor Alec Harvey. Their casual friendship soon develops during their weekly visits into somethi

recommendations.title: Great Expectations
recommendations.overview: In this Dickens adaptation, orphan Pip discovers through lawyer Mr. Jaggers that a mysterious benefactor wishes to ensure that he becomes a gentleman. Reunited with his childhood patron, Miss Havisham, and his first love, the beautiful but emotionall

recommendations.title: Summertime
recommendations.overview: Middle-aged Ohio secretary Jane Hudson has never found love and has nearly resigned herself to spending the rest of her life alone. But before she does, she uses her savings to finance a summer in romantic Venice, where she finally meets the man of h

recommendations.title: Oliver Twist
